variables.description: 3. Can the participant not comply with study procedures or have other factors that would inhibit his or her participation as determined by the PI's discretion?

variables.name: radiation_exposure
variables.description: 2. Has the participant participated in any other study within the past 12 months which would result in increasing the child's radiation exposure above 500 mrem for the calendar year?

variables.description: 1.  Has the participant been diagnosed with MPS I, II, or VI?

variables.name: subject_eligible_age
variables.description: 3. Is the participant >= 5 years and <= 35 years?  Age at entry into study must be >= 5 years and <= 33 years to ensure a minimum of 2 study visits.
